mapper.sql: select c.comment_id, c.task_id, c.comment_user_id, c.reply_user_id, c.comment_content, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, cu.nick_name as comment_user_name, cu.avatar as comment_user_avatar, ru.nick_name as reply_user_name from campus_task_comment c left join sys_user cu on c.comment_user_id = cu.user_id left join sys_user ru on c.reply_user_id = ru.user_id
mapper.select: where c.del_flag = '0' and c.task_id = #{taskId} order by c.create_time asc
mapper.update: update campus_task_comment set del_flag = '2' where comment_id = #{commentId}
update campus_task_comment set del_flag = '2' where task_id in #{taskId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from campus_task_comment where del_flag = '0' and task_id = #{taskId}
